## 🎯 Type of Change

Mark the relevant option with an "x":

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (change that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (documentation changes)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change without affecting functionality)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (performance improvement)
- [ ] 🎨 Style (formatting changes, no logic changes)

## 🔗 Related Issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR closes or resolves -->

Closes #(issue number)

## 📋 Checklist

Make sure your PR meets the following requirements:

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have read and agree with [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and there are no errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` to format the code
- [ ] I have run `npm run type-check` and there are no errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` successfully
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] My changes do not generate new warnings
